name: Sand Sugar Cookies (Sandbakkels)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift salt, cream of tartar, baking soda, and flour together; set aside.
2. Cream butter and sugar until smooth.
3. Add eggs to the mixture and beat well.
4. Incorporate milk and vanilla extract.
5. Gradually add the sifted dry ingredients to the wet mixture.
6. Let the dough stand in the refrigerator for at least an hour before rolling out.
7. Roll out thinly, cut into desired shapes, and sprinkle with sugar.
8. Bake for 10-12 minutes at 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
